articles.headline: Pep Guardiola: 'Bit weird' that Man City are playing Real Madrid again
articles.description: Manchester City boss Pep Guardiola admits it feels "a little bit weird" to be facing Real Madrid in the Champions League yet again.

images.alt: Pep Guardiola: 'Bit weird' that Man City are playing Real Madrid again

articles.headline: Benfica suspend 5 fans for racist behaviour vs. Real Madrid
articles.description: Benfica suspended five supporters after an investigation found they engaged in behaviour of a "racist nature" in the club's match with Real Madrid.

images.alt: Benfica suspend 5 fans for racist behaviour vs. Real Madrid

gmStry.hdln: Chelsea clinch top 8 with win, eliminate Napoli
gmStry.desc: João Pedro led a Chelsea fightback that saw them through to the Champions League last 16 with two second-half goals to beat Napoli 3-2 at the Diego Maradona Stadium.

keyEvents.dtls: Juan Jesus (Napoli) is shown the yellow card for handball.
Goal! Napoli 0, Chelsea 1. Enzo Fernández (Chelsea) converts the penalty with a right footed shot to the bottom left corner.
Goal! Napoli 1, Chelsea 1. Antonio Vergara (Napoli) left footed shot from the centre of the box to the bottom right corner. Assisted by Mathías Olivera.
Goal! Napoli 2, Chelsea 1. Rasmus Højlund (Napoli) left footed shot from the centre of the box to the bottom left corner. Assisted by Mathías Olivera.
Substitution, Chelsea. Cole Palmer replaces Pedro Neto.
keyEvents.shrtDtls: On: Cole Palmer | Off: Pedro Neto

keyEvents.dtls: Substitution, Chelsea. Trevoh Chalobah replaces Malo Gusto.
keyEvents.shrtDtls:
On: Trevoh Chalobah | Off: Malo Gusto
On: Jamie Gittens | Off: Andrey Santos

keyEvents.dtls: Goal! Napoli 2, Chelsea 2. João Pedro (Chelsea) left footed shot from outside the box to the top right corner. Assisted by Cole Palmer.
Substitution, Napoli. Miguel Gutiérrez replaces Juan Jesus.
keyEvents.shrtDtls: On: Miguel Gutiérrez | Off: Juan Jesus

keyEvents.dtls: Substitution, Chelsea. Alejandro Garnacho replaces Estêvão.
Eljif Elmas (Napoli) is shown the yellow card for a bad foul.
Substitution, Napoli. Sam Beukema replaces Leonardo Spinazzola.
keyEvents.shrtDtls:
On: Sam Beukema | Off: Leonardo Spinazzola
On: Romelu Lukaku | Off: Eljif Elmas

keyEvents.dtls: Goal! Napoli 2, Chelsea 3. João Pedro (Chelsea) right footed shot from the centre of the box to the bottom left corner. Assisted by Cole Palmer following a fast break.
Wesley Fofana (Chelsea) is shown the yellow card for a bad foul.
Substitution, Chelsea. Benoît Badiashile replaces Jamie Gittens.
